AI directive: Solar Activity Boosts Power Systems
On Sol 7, analysis revealed unknown bacteria in the Martian soil sample. This discovery may provide new insights into Mars' past habitability.

daily_event.headline: Solar Activity Boosts Power Systems
daily_event.summary: Solar activity has increased to 84%, providing a temporary surge in energy generation across all colonies.

missions.title: Expand Water Extraction
missions.briefing: With moderate temperatures and stable conditions, now is an ideal time to increase water extraction capacity.
missions.objective: Deploy and activate additional water extraction units near Helios Prospecting.
missions.reward_hint: Gain increased water reserves for your colony.
missions.risk: Potential mechanical failure due to harsh terrain.

missions.title: Optimize Energy Storage
missions.briefing: Leverage the solar activity surge by upgrading energy storage systems to avoid waste during peak generation.
missions.objective: Install enhanced battery modules at Dustline Agro facilities.
missions.risk: Installation delays may cause missed energy gains.

missions.title: Food Supply Recon
missions.briefing: Early spring conditions allow scouting for new arable zones to increase food production.
missions.objective: Survey and report viable agricultural sites near Ares Systems.
missions.risk: Exposure to cold may impact scouting team health.

npc_transmissions.message: Solar activity elevated; optimize energy harvesting to capitalize on increased power.
Request assistance for additional water extraction units to support expanding operations.

ai.news_summary: On Sol 7 of early spring, Mars experiences a significant solar activity boost enhancing energy production. Colonies are advised to optimize resource extraction and storage to maximize benefits. Conditions remain stable with no dust storms reported.

last_diagnostics.reason: daily content already generated for Sol 7
